value.body:
## Context

The ideal workflow is that users prioritize and approve, while agents pick only work that is ready. Priority alone is not enough when dependencies exist.

## Outcome

Cycle can recommend or assign the next agent-ready ticket by priority, dependency readiness, repository availability, agent capability, and user approval policy.

## Acceptance criteria

- Queue query returns candidate tickets sorted by urgent/high/medium/low/none plus freshness and readiness.
- Blocked tickets are excluded by default and include a reason when requested.
- Claiming a ticket is atomic and records assignee, status, run id, and timestamp.
- MCP exposes a `claim next` style operation for agents and a preview operation for UI.
- Tests cover priority ordering, dependency blocking, concurrent claims, and no-work states.

## Dependencies

Requires `UKN-DIGLY` and should use the dependency model from the ticket dependency feature.
value.title: Add dependency-aware agent claim-next workflow
